scenarios.prompt: Run SHIFTWORK-INTAKE-VQA-MARKETING-01. Load the matching Marketing fixture from shiftwork-five-track-intake-fixtures.json. Create a workspace and writer thread, persist the intake JSON to /opulent/workspace/uploads/drive, verify paid handoff payload, selected questionnaire 01_Marketing_Discovery_Template, marker SHIFTWORK_INTAKE_VQA_MARKETING_TOKEN_20260701, owner_confirmed build-critical answers, draft_from_research_unconfirmed research-only answers, marketing visual QA target URL/routes/viewports/checks/email draft rules, and five acceptance inputs. Save/list workspace files and record fileId. Create a separate reader thread in the same workspace, retrieve the file by fileId, verify the same marker and fields without using original thread context, produce a build plan from the retrieved intake only, run validation_check, then autos_done summary SHIFTWORK_INTAKE_VQA_MARKETING_COMPLETE.
